skill: One-variable data: Distributions and measures of center and spread
stem:
12, 15, 18, 19, 22, 26, 29, 33, 37

What is the median of the data shown?
rationale: The correct answer is 22. The median of a data set with an odd number of values is the middle value when the values are ordered from least to greatest. The data set has 9 values already ordered, so the median is the 5th value, which is 22.
